findings.recommended_remediation: recommend the adjudicator require approval_gate='required' or reduce the operation to read-only

findings.reason: auto-write access to 'Highly Confidential' data without approval_gate='required'
findings.recommended_remediation: recommend the adjudicator narrow the mode to read-only or require an approval gate for sensitive-data writes

findings.reason: production environment with an ungated effective-write operation
findings.recommended_remediation: recommend the adjudicator block production promotion until the write is gated or removed

findings.reason: operation lacks a declared business need and/or an approving justification reference

value.declared_need: approve entitlement changes for downstream agents

findings.recommended_remediation: recommend the adjudicator require a documented business need and approving reference before any grant

findings.reason: operation touches 'Restricted' data, which is not in the manifest's declared classification scope
findings.recommended_remediation: recommend the adjudicator require the classification be added to declared scope with justification, or remove the operation

findings.reason: audit logging is disabled for a 'Confidential' source
findings.recommended_remediation: recommend the adjudicator require audit logging be enabled before any grant

findings.reason: no revocation terms or recertification cadence defined
findings.recommended_remediation: recommend the adjudicator require a revocation owner and a recertification cadence

findings.reason: agent holds both effective-write and approve duties, a segregation-of-duties conflict
findings.recommended_remediation: recommend the adjudicator split write and approve duties across separate agents/identities

disclaimer: Least-privilege review evidence only; not an access approval or denial. No entitlement has been granted, revoked, or provisioned, and no review has been closed. Human adjudication is required.
narrative: Least-privilege review of agent 'wealth-portfolio-copilot' (production) against policy iam-lp-2026.07 evaluated 6 operations and raised 8 findings (2 Critical, 5 High, 1 Medium). The Critical findings are an ungated effective-write payment operation (OP-003) that also writes Highly Confidential data without a required approval gate. High findings include a segregation-of-duties conflict (the agent holds both write and approve duties), a Restricted classification touched outside the declared scope, an unlogged Confidential read, and a missing justification reference. Recommended disposition: Remediate-before-approval. This is a recommendation for a human adjudicator; the reviewer has not decided the request. Least-privilege review evidence only; not an access approval or denial. No entitlement has been granted, revoked, or provisioned, and no review has been closed. Human adjudication is required.
